nodes.name: 淡褐唧霸鹟
nodes.summary: 淡褐唧霸鹟（Drab water tyrant，学名 Ochthornis littoralis），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联7个分布地点节点。
nodes.shortSummary: 淡褐唧霸鹟（台湾作淡褐水霸鶲，学名：Ochthornis littoralis），是雀形目霸鹟科的一种鸟类，属于单型的淡褐唧霸鹟属（学名：Ochthornis）。 特征 淡褐唧霸鹟体重约13.4克，翼长约70.2毫米，喙宽度约4.6毫米，喙厚度约3.2毫米，嘴峰长约14.5毫米…

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Sclater]], 1888 | species = littoralis | authority = (Pelzeln, 1868) | synonyms = *Muscicapa littoralis *Elainea littoralis *Ochthoeca littoralis | range_map = Ochthornis littoralis map.svg }} The drab water tyrant (Ochthornis littoralis) is a species of bird in the family Tyrannidae, the tyrant flycatchers. It is found in Bolivia, Brazil, Colombia, Ecuador, Guyana, Peru, Suriname, and Venezuela.Remsen, J

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is found from eastern Colombia south through eastern Ecuador and eastern Peru into northwestern Bolivia and east through southern Venezuela and Guyana into Suriname and throughout northwestern and north-central Brazil. Though some sources describe a small separate range in French Guiana and adjoining northern Brazil, the South American Classification Committee of the American Ornithological Society has no records in French Guiana. The drab water tyrant is always found near water, especially large rivers
